Definition: A digital resource attached to or embedded in a Post
A MediaAttachment that is a data visualization depicting quantitative information
A MediaAttachment that is an extracted portion of a document, article, or report
A MediaAttachment that is a photographic image of a real-world scene
A MediaAttachment that is a designed visual composition combining data, text, and graphics
A MediaAttachment that is a video recording or animation
A classification category for the structural form of a chart
A dimensional axis of a chart with label, unit, and scale
A named data series plotted within a chart
The time period that a chart's data covers
The geographic area that a chart's data covers
An organization that publishes energy data accessible via API or download
A specific dataset published by an EnergyDataProvider
The origin of a media attachment's descriptive text — original (author-provided), synthetic (vision-generated), or absent
Relates a Post to its attached media
Relates a Chart to its ChartType classification
Relates a Chart to its horizontal axis
Relates a Chart to its vertical axis
Relates a Chart to a plotted data series
The descriptive text for a media attachment
The provenance classification of a media attachment's alt text
The displayed label text of a chart axis
The unit of measurement on a chart axis (MW, TWh, $/MWh, %)
The unit of measurement for a data series
The most salient data point or trend highlighted by a chart

Synonyms: source line, attribution line, data credit
Definition: The source attribution text appearing on a chart, typically at the bottom
The raw text of a chart's source attribution line as it appears on the chart
Relates a Chart to its source attribution line
The text label for a data series as shown in the chart legend
Relates an EnergyDataset to its EnergyDataProvider
The CDN URL of the media attachment's full-resolution file
The CDN URL of the media attachment's thumbnail
